response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and open-source engineering experience, they lack the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership in scale-ups, have no demonstrable production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech, and their recent career gap and limited exposure to regulated financial systems or AI governance frameworks make them unfit for this executive CTO role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure
Active contributor to developer tooling and community education
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks 5+ years of senior technical leadership at scale-ups as required
Recent career gap and minimal exposure to real-time credit risk or working-capital AI systems
